# Alerting

## Purpose
Use this skill when reviewing alerts, tuning thresholds, and reducing noise.

## Triggers
- "alert storm"
- "false positives"
- "threshold tuning"
- "paging policy"

## Outputs
- Alert quality assessment
- Noise vs signal analysis
- Tuning recommendations
- Routing and escalation updates

## Example Prompts
- "We had 120 pages overnight with no customer impact. How do we reduce noise?"
- "Suggest threshold updates for high-latency alerts on search service."
